task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to the Lab Requests or Labs section in HospitalRun.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun interface shows the 'Labs' or 'Requests' tab active, displaying a list of lab requests.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent locates the specific 'Lipid Panel' lab request for Tanya Bleecker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table row or list item displaying 'Tanya Bleecker' (or P00555) and 'Lipid Panel' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiates the removal or cancellation of the target request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A click on a 'Delete', 'Cancel', or 'Remove' button associated with Tanya Bleecker's Lipid Panel request, or a confirmation dialog for this action being accepted.

task_completion.description: Verify the target lab request is successfully removed from the active list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lab requests list is visible and Tanya Bleecker's 'Lipid Panel' request is no longer present in the list.

task_completion.description: Verify the control lab request for John Doe is unmodified and still present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lab requests list still displays the lab request for 'John Doe'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the HospitalRun graphical interface to cancel the request.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the HospitalRun UI, not a terminal executing curl, database commands, or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the real application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun application is visible with its standard layout, menus, and styling, rather than a text editor or static mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to simply hide the target element.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element/DOM editor) are open in the screenshots to artificially hide the table row.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Tanya Bleecker (ID: patient_p1_P00555). Target Lab Request: Lipid Panel (ID: lab_p1_REQ001). Control Patient: John Doe. Control Lab Request: lab_p1_REQ002. The VLM should verify that the Lipid Panel request for Tanya Bleecker is removed via the UI while John Doe's request remains intact.
